project: Lantern Quest Storybook Art Prompt Pack

styleGuide.visualDirection: chunky voxel-inspired colonial Boston at night, block-built environments, lantern glow, moonlit harbor, cinematic storybook framing, child-friendly clarity, playful but dramatic, handcrafted digital diorama look
doUse: voxel-inspired trees, rooftops, gravestones, boats, horses, lanterns, cobblestone streets, church towers
moonlit navy blues, fog gray, lantern gold, warm candle windows, mist over water
clear storytelling composition with one main action per image
consistent Paul Revere silhouette: tricorn hat, riding cloak, determined pose
consistent Old North / church silhouette with tall belfry and colonial details
doNotUse: copyrighted game logos, UI, hearts, inventory bars, creepers, branded blocks, branded fonts, exact Minecraft characters or assets
modern city elements, cars, streetlights, electric lighting
styleGuide.globalSuffix: voxel-inspired colonial Boston storybook scene, block-built environment, cinematic moonlight, dramatic lantern glow, kid-friendly educational adventure, richly detailed but readable composition, no copyrighted game assets, no text, no logo, no watermark
continuityNotes: Keep Paul Revere visually recognizable across images: slim rider, tricorn hat, dark cloak, alert posture.
Keep the friend / watcher visually recognizable: colonial coat, purposeful expression, often framed against tower ladders or windows.
Preserve a single coherent world palette across the full poem.

prompts.title: The Midnight Warning Begins
prompts.prompt: A moonlit colonial Boston street at midnight, one rider in a tricorn hat preparing for an urgent warning mission, distant church steeple, shuttered windows, misty air, rooftops and chimneys stacked like block-built toy buildings, the whole city feels asleep but history is about to move, cinematic wide establishing shot, voxel-inspired sandbox adventure aesthetic, blocky handcrafted environment, dramatic storybook lighting. voxel-inspired colonial Boston storybook scene, block-built environment, cinematic moonlight, dramatic lantern glow, kid-friendly educational adventure, richly detailed but readable composition, no copyrighted game assets, no text, no logo, no watermark
